name: memory-check
args: $mem = Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem; Write-Host ('Memory Usage: {0:N2}% ({1:N2} GB / {2:N2} GB)' -f (($mem.TotalVisibleMemorySize - $mem.FreePhysicalMemory) / $mem.TotalVisibleMemorySize * 100), (($mem.TotalVisibleMemorySize - $mem.FreePhysicalMemory) / 1MB), ($mem.TotalVisibleMemorySize / 1MB))
